detail.description:
Cute… but a little scary.
A romance simulation game with a beautiful monster girl.

slit-mouthed woman, Sadako and monster return—this time as beautiful girls in a romance simulation game!

The gameplay is simple—just tap one of three choices.
Pick the right answer, and your sweet love story continues.
Choose wrong… and it's an instant bad ending.

・Fans of monster and pretty girls.
・Anyone who wants a short and sweet romance game.
・Those who like a little horror mixed with love.

Win your monst
detail.recentChanges:
This update adds a Login Bonus feature, a brand-new monster and improvements to the Collection feature!

■What’s New
・Added a new monster: Guardian Lion-Dogs
・Added a Login Bonus feature. Log in for 7 days to unlock the high-difficulty stage “The Beauty Demon”
・Added a Special Collection purchase option in the Collection screen, where you can meet monster babe in exclusive outfits
